results.title: If 2018 election was legitimate, so is current govt: PM Shehbaz
results.description: Says till all 4 provinces are equal companions in growth, it can’t be referred to as Pakistan’s growth Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif addressing the Nationwide Meeting. PHOTO: PMO ISLAMABAD: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif on Tuesday rejected opposition claims that his authorities lacked legitimacy, telling the Nationwide Meeting that if the 2018 common election was thought-about [...] The post If 2018 election was legitimate, so is current govt: PM Shehbaz appeared first on Asia Today .

results.title: Records show watchdog's probe kept secret as governor's office claims confidentiality
results.description: HARRISBURG — For nearly two years, the Shapiro administration has refused to say whether a state watchdog under the governor’s jurisdiction investigated Pennsylvania’s network of agencies that are supposed to help older adults who are abused and neglected.

results.title: Trump allies defend him to Israelis anxious over Iran deal
results.description: The US-Israeli relationship has been on a roller coaster, from the early confidence they shared after their joint attack on Iran to public disagreements between Trump and Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu over how to end the four-month-old war
